source.purpose: Authoritative list of Compound V3 Comet markets deployed on Ethereum mainnet. Used by the reconciliation gate as the cross-check source for the cited Comet count in the report prose.
source.maintenance_protocol: Every time a new Comet ships on Ethereum, the maintainer adds the entry here AND updates the manifest entry compound_v3_comet_count.cited_value to match. The gate fails on drift between this file and the manifest cited value. Authoritative reference is the compound-finance/comet repository deployments/mainnet/ directory and Compound governance proposals announcing each Comet deployment.
source.verified_against: app.compound.finance/markets at May 31, 2026; cross-checked against compound-finance/comet GitHub deployments/mainnet/ directory and Compound governance forum announcements.

erratum_2026_06_08: Original 2026-05-compound-comet-markets.json enumerated only the four established markets. The wstETH and WBTC bases were missed. This file is the canonical inventory going forward; the markets snapshot should be regenerated against this list.
